title: 日本ダービーの後に・誉

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Shining splendidly in first place is none other than
Narita Brian! This is her second crown following
her victory in the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is going wild! And Narita Brian, the
new Derby Champion, raises her fist in the air in
reply!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(If I shut my eyes, I can still see the that final
stretch. Everyone straining, fighting for the finish
line.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(I feel like I'm still there, still running... More. I
want more...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Brian! Brian! Brian! Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. But the next race is the Kikuka Sho,
where only the strongest racer can win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is a long-distance 3,000-meter
turf race. It's the final race in the Classic Triple
Crown tour and requires both speed and stamina
to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The battle for the finish line continues. An even
more exciting race awaits...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Brian! Congratulations on your second crown!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
We can't wait to see you follow in Symboli
Rudolf's footsteps and become the next Triple
Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: I'll take care of them as usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown Champion following Rudolf,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ridiculous! Who's following anyone?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Goals aren't to be chased after, they're to be exceeded!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the concert, I take Narita Brian back to the
academy, where...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Amazon?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I won the Japanese Oaks and you won the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh... So you have two tiaras now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah. And I'm getting ready to take you down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh? So when are we going to face each other?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't get ahead of yourself. The Arima
Kinen is where it's gonna go down.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's where we'll see who's the best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And if one of us doesn't get our three trophies?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Does it matter? You're always goin' on about how
you're not interested in titles.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want to talk about what comes after the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the major year-end event—a 2,500-meter turf
race in Nakayama, where top-tier runners earn
their reputation.
choice_data_list: You'd be competing with senior-year racers.
You'd be competing with senior-year racers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So the Kikuka Sho determines who's the strongest
in their generation, and the Arima Kinen
determines who's the strongest of all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hah... Sounds great. Going for the top is what
being an Umamusume's all about!
